rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement reduces oil price risk marginally, but no direct new impact on Poland; war in Ukraine continues without qualitative change; overall cycle is quiet for a Polish resident.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes, markets surge
top_events.summary: Stock markets rallied on news of a US-Iran deal; lower war risk in Middle East could ease energy price pressure indirectly for Poland.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No qualitative escalation reported this cycle; ongoing background threat to eastern Poland and refugee flows.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño active; could affect European weather patterns, agriculture, and energy demand in coming months.
